title: Jamaican Tofu Frittata
description: A spicy Jamaican twist on the classic Italian dish, featuring tofu and a hint of Caribbean flavor.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the Jamaican seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, salt, and black pepper.
Add the tofu, melted cheese, and cooked onion and bell pepper mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate or skillet.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the frittata is set and golden brown.
Let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
